name: nodex-extension
description: Hands-free YouTube control via head gestures. Chrome MV3 extension.

scripts.prod: rm -rf dist nodex.zip && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../nodex.zip .
scripts.zip:source: rm -f nodex-extension-source.zip && find . -type f ! -path './node_modules/*' ! -path './dist/*' ! -path './.git/*' ! -name '.DS_Store' ! -name 'nodex-extension-source.zip' ! -name 'nodex.zip' -print | zip -@ nodex-extension-source.zip
